title: MIGLIORA LA BIOSICUREZZA CON IL TUO GRUPPO DI ESPERTI ALL’INTERNO DELL’ALLEVAMENTO
description: A factsheet providing a step-by-step guide for farmers, veterinarians, and consultants to implement a multi-actor approach (MAFH) for improving farm biosecurity. It outlines forming an expert group, assessing baseline health and antibiotic use, setting SMART objectives, and using PDCA cycles to monitor and adjust a farm health plan.
